prompt: Create a high-fashion photorealistic studio portrait of an adult East Asian woman with long wavy black hair with wispy bangs, reclining in a plush deep cobalt-blue modern lounge chair. She wears a fitted pale beige lace slip mini dress with thin straps, a delicate gold pendant necklace, a ring, and glossy black strappy high-heeled sandals. Pose her with one arm raised behind her head, the other hand touching her hair, legs crossed toward the camera, relaxed and confident with a dreamy slightly parted-lips expression and soft smoky eye makeup. Use a cool gray minimalist room with a large round mirror behind her, dramatic direct flash lighting, crisp shadows, glossy skin highlights, and an editorial nightlife fashion mood. Frame vertically in a close full-body composition from slightly above, emphasizing the blue chair curves, the lace texture, and the diagonal pose. Add a small colorful paint-splatter logo in the top-right corner reading xixi:VSC. Keep the image realistic, polished, magazine-like, with no extra people, no clutter, and no additional text.
